---
title: "Chapter III — Signal Reconstruction"
---

{{< include ../../research/phase_03_signals/README.md >}}

{{< include ../../research/phase_03_signals/core_stat_arb.md >}}

{{< include ../../research/phase_03_signals/options_vol.md >}}

{{< include ../../research/phase_03_signals/modern_ml.md >}}

See the full [signal database](../appendices/signal-database.qmd).
